symbols.description: Frontend sprite-button flag word passed to initialize_frontend_sprite_button by initialize_warning.

symbols.name: apply_all_border_visibility_mode
symbols.description: Shared border-manager batch helper called by hide_all_borders and unhide_all_borders to apply a visibility mode to active border records.

symbols.name: initialize_runtime_slot
symbols.description: Shared small-object constructor callback used by runtime slot arrays and enemy-manager I/O stream members.

symbols.name: update_row_event_display_jump_table
symbols.description: Compiler-emitted state switch jump table used by update_row_event_display.

symbols.name: update_frontend_state_machine_jump_table
symbols.description: Compiler-emitted state switch jump table used by update_frontend_state_machine.

symbols.name: release_global_direct3d_renderer_resources
symbols.description: Tiny wrapper that loads g_direct3d_renderer into ecx and tail-calls the renderer resource teardown used by input/window shutdown paths.

symbols.name: set_blend_mode_jump_table
symbols.description: Compiler-emitted switch target table used by set_blend_mode after the blend preset lookup.

symbols.name: set_blend_mode_lookup_table
symbols.description: Compiler-emitted byte lookup table mapping object blend preset ids 0..20 to set_blend_mode case indexes.

symbols.name: create_object_vertex_buffer_resource
symbols.description: Renderer resource factory method used by build_object_texture_group_buffers to allocate the grouped object D3D vertex-buffer wrapper.

symbols.name: create_object_index_buffer_resource
symbols.description: Renderer resource factory method used by build_object_texture_group_buffers to allocate object D3D index-buffer wrappers.

symbols.name: g_object_grouped_vertex_cursor
symbols.description: Build/render object texture-group vertex cursor reset by build_object_texture_group_buffers, incremented by get_or_append_object_texture_group_vertex, copied to Object+0xc4, and used for D3D vertex-buffer lock sizes.

symbols.name: g_object_grouped_vertex_scratch
symbols.description: Pointer to the 0x1c-byte temporary object render vertex records used while build_object_texture_group_buffers appends/de-duplicates grouped vertices and uploads the D3D vertex buffer.

symbols.name: g_loading_screen
symbols.description: Loading-screen progress state initialized by initialize_loading_screen and ticked during archive/object build loading passes.

symbols.name: configure_sprite_render_state_jump_table
symbols.description: Compiler-emitted switch target table used by configure_sprite_render_state.

symbols.name: configure_sprite_render_state_lookup_table
symbols.description: Compiler-emitted byte lookup table mapping sparse sprite draw modes to configure_sprite_render_state case indexes.

symbols.name: update_golb_ai_jump_table
symbols.description: Compiler-emitted switch jump table used by update_golb_ai.

symbols.name: g_used_fringe_bods_count_offset
symbols.description: Relocatable used-fringe-BOD counter reported by build_track_fringe_objects through the stripped debug report stub.

symbols.description: Relocatable player position.y offset used by damage-gauge grounded checks and attachment-entry seeding.

symbols.description: Relocatable player position.z offset used by track-relative emitter and progress checks.

symbols.description: Relocatable player-region exit gate used by damage-gauge state-2 exit checks.

symbols.name: g_high_score_bank
symbols.description: Relocatable high-score bank offset used by completion dispatch.

symbols.name: g_track_colour_bank_a
symbols.description: 51-entry track colour bank initialized by build_track_colours.

symbols.name: g_time_trial_string
symbols.description: Shared Time Trial HUD string buffer written by format_time_trial_string and copied into subgame UI records.

symbols.name: g_voice_manager
symbols.description: Shared voice manager object initialized at startup and used by subgoldy, attachment, cutscene, and damage feedback callsites.

symbols.name: g_bass_channel_remove_sync
symbols.description: BASS_ChannelRemoveSync function pointer used when stopping the active music stream.

symbols.name: g_bass_start
symbols.description: BASS_Start function pointer used to resume the audio backend.

symbols.name: g_active_music_stream_sync
symbols.description: Active BASS stream sync handle cleared by stop_music_stream.

symbols.name: g_bass_sample_play_ex
symbols.description: BASS_SamplePlayEx function pointer used by registered sample playback wrappers.

symbols.name: g_bass_free
symbols.description: BASS_Free function pointer used when uninitializing the BASS backend.

symbols.name: g_registered_sound_sample_handles
symbols.description: Registered BASS sample handles indexed by gameplay sound sample id.

symbols.name: g_bass_channel_stop
symbols.description: BASS_ChannelStop function pointer used when stopping the active music stream.

symbols.name: g_bass_stop
symbols.description: BASS_Stop function pointer used by audio backend stop/uninitialize helpers.

symbols.name: g_bass_set_config
symbols.description: BASS_SetConfig function pointer used by sample and stream volume config wrappers.

symbols.name: g_active_music_stream
symbols.description: Active BASS stream handle stopped and freed by stop_music_stream.

symbols.name: g_audio_backend
symbols.description: Shared audio backend object used by voice, sample, and stream helpers.

symbols.name: g_stream_volume_scale
symbols.description: Runtime stream-volume scale multiplied with the saved stream-volume config before applying audio settings.

symbols.name: g_bass_module
symbols.description: Loaded BASS module handle used when resolving and freeing BASS functions.

symbols.name: g_bass_sample_stop
symbols.description: BASS_SampleStop function pointer used by registered sample stop wrappers.

symbols.name: g_bass_sample_is_active
symbols.description: BASS_SampleIsActive function pointer used by registered sample state checks.

symbols.name: g_bass_stream_free
symbols.description: BASS_StreamFree function pointer used when stopping the active music stream.

symbols.name: g_bass_pause
symbols.description: BASS_Pause function pointer used to pause the audio backend.

symbols.name: g_font_text_buffer
symbols.description: Transient font text string buffer reset by update_font_wave_state and appended by queue_font_text_instance before the font queue array.

symbols.name: g_font_queue
symbols.description: Shared 0x400-entry FontQueueEntry array populated by queued text and quad helpers before draw_font_text_queue drains it.

symbols.name: k_runtime_flags_mode4
symbols.description: Subgame runtime feature flag preset assigned by set_subgame_features for level mode 4.

symbols.name: g_font_wave_phase_a
symbols.description: First global text-wave animation phase initialized by initialize_font_wave_state and advanced by update_font_wave_state.

symbols.name: g_font_wave_phase_b
symbols.description: Second global text-wave animation phase initialized by initialize_font_wave_state and advanced by update_font_wave_state.

symbols.name: g_font_text_cursor
symbols.description: Cursor into g_font_text_buffer reset by update_font_wave_state and advanced by queue_font_text_instance.

symbols.name: g_font_wave_step_b
symbols.description: Second text-wave phase increment seeded by initialize_font_wave_state and consumed by update_font_wave_state.

symbols.name: g_registered_font_count
symbols.description: Per-frame registered font counter cleared by update_font_wave_state before font records are queued.

symbols.name: g_font_queue_count
symbols.description: Live font queue entry count cleared by update_font_wave_state and incremented by font text and quad queue helpers.

symbols.name: g_font_wave_step_a
symbols.description: First text-wave phase increment seeded by initialize_font_wave_state and consumed by update_font_wave_state.

symbols.name: g_joystick_count
symbols.description: Number of enumerated DirectInput joystick devices appended by append_enumerated_input_controller_callback and consumed by joystick update/release paths.

symbols.name: g_joystick_input
symbols.description: DirectInput parent object used while enumerating joystick devices in enumerate_input_controllers.

symbols.name: g_joystick_devices
symbols.description: Four-entry DirectInput joystick device array populated during controller enumeration, polled by update_joystick_input, and released by release_input_controllers.

symbols.name: g_keyboard_previous_state
symbols.description: Previous DirectInput keyboard state copied from the current buffer by update_keyboard_input and read by is_key_pressed_edge.

symbols.name: g_keyboard_current_state
symbols.description: Current DirectInput keyboard state polled by update_keyboard_input and read by is_key_down and is_key_pressed_edge.

symbols.name: g_keyboard_input
symbols.description: DirectInput parent object handle created by initialize_keyboard_input and released by release_keyboard_input.

symbols.name: g_keyboard_device
symbols.description: DirectInput keyboard device handle polled by update_keyboard_input and unacquired/released by release_keyboard_input.

symbols.name: g_mouse_live_x
symbols.description: Two-slot authored/live mouse X coordinate array updated by click_mouse_screen and consumed by update_mouse.

symbols.name: g_mouse_live_y
symbols.description: Two-slot authored/live mouse Y coordinate array updated by click_mouse_screen and consumed by update_mouse.

symbols.name: g_mouse_screen_to_authored_y_scale
symbols.description: Screen-to-authored mouse Y scale computed from the cached clip rectangle by update_mouse_authored_scale and consumed by convert_mouse_screen_xy.

symbols.name: g_mouse_screen_to_authored_x_scale
symbols.description: Screen-to-authored mouse X scale computed from the cached clip rectangle by update_mouse_authored_scale and consumed by convert_mouse_screen_xy.

symbols.name: g_hide_system_cursor_flag
symbols.description: Global cursor-hide flag initialized by mouse input setup, read by update_mouse, and written by set_hide_system_cursor_flag.

symbols.name: g_mouse_screen_y
symbols.description: Two-slot raw mouse screen Y coordinate array written by click_mouse_screen.

symbols.name: g_mouse_screen_x
symbols.description: Two-slot raw mouse screen X coordinate array written by click_mouse_screen.

symbols.name: g_mouse_clip_rect
symbols.description: Cached Win32 clip RECT populated by initialize_mouse_authored_scale_from_clip_rect and consumed by update_mouse_authored_scale.

symbols.name: g_mouse_input
symbols.description: DirectInput parent object handle created by initialize_mouse_input and released by release_mouse_input.

symbols.name: g_mouse_device
symbols.description: DirectInput mouse device handle polled by update_mouse and unacquired/released by release_mouse_input.

symbols.name: g_cosine_table_init_base
symbols.description: Synthetic one-float-before relocation base used by initialize_trigonometry_tables before the canonical cosine table starts at 0x777f3c.

symbols.name: cross_vectors_static_guard
symbols.description: Compiler-generated guard byte for the function-local static Vec3 result in cross_vectors; it shares storage with the synthetic trigonometry init-base reference.

symbols.name: g_math_random_index
symbols.description: Gameplay random-table cursor reset by initialize_math_random_table and advanced by next_math_random_value.

symbols.name: g_identity_matrix
symbols.description: Shared identity transform initialized by initialize_global_identity_matrix.

symbols.name: cross_vectors_static_result
symbols.description: Function-local static Vec3 result storage used by cross_vectors before copying back to the destination vector.

symbols.name: g_sine_table_init_base
symbols.description: Synthetic one-float-before relocation base used by initialize_trigonometry_tables before the canonical sine table starts at 0x77ff8c.

symbols.name: g_sine_table
symbols.description: Trigonometry sine lookup table initialized at startup and read by sine.

symbols.name: g_cosine_table
symbols.description: Trigonometry cosine lookup table initialized at startup and read by cosine.

symbols.name: g_math_random_table
symbols.description: 0x1fff-entry gameplay random table initialized at startup.

symbols.name: g_sound_effect_manager
symbols.description: Global sound-effect manager object used by gameplay feedback helpers.

symbols.name: g_sprite_texture_table
symbols.description: 1000-entry registered sprite texture table populated by register_sprite_texture and read by sprite texture accessors.

symbols.name: g_sprite_manager
symbols.description: Shared sprite manager used by gameplay particle, projectile, parcel, and presentation helpers.

symbols.name: g_sprite_active_heads
symbols.description: Five active sprite bucket heads at the tail of g_sprite_manager; allocate_sprite and kill_sprite index this table by sprite owner.

symbols.name: g_sprite_free_head
symbols.description: Head of the sprite free list maintained by initialize_sprite_manager, allocate_sprite, and kill_sprite.

symbols.name: g_sprite_sentinel
symbols.description: Sentinel sprite returned when allocation fails; kill_sprite treats this address as a no-op.
